task_name: Add New AI Image Provider to Vercel AI SDK

plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's a summary of the plan I've written to the plan file:

## Plan: Add `packages/pixelart/` Provider

I explored the codebase thoroughly (using `packages/togetherai` as the closest analogue — a provider with image-generation support) and designed a 10-file package that follows every existing convention.

### Files to create (all under `packages/pixelart/`)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `package.json` | Package metadata, deps (`@ai-sdk/provider` + `@ai-sdk/provider-utils`), scripts, exports |
| `tsconfig.json` | Composite TS config referencing `../provider` + `../provider-utils` |
| `tsconfig.build.json` | Disables composite for tsup builds |
| `tsup.config.ts` | CJS + ESM + `.d.ts` bundle with version injection |
| `vitest.node.config.js` / `vitest.edge.config.js` | Test runner configs |
| `src/version.ts` | Build-time version injection |
| `src/pixelart-image-settings.ts` | `PixelArtImageModelId` type + `PixelArtImageSettings` interface |
| `src/pixelart-image-model.ts` | `PixelArtImageModel implements ImageModelV3` |
| `src/pixelart-provider.ts` | `PixelArtProvider`, `createPixelArt()`, default `pixelart` instance |
| `src/index.ts` | Public exports |

### Key design decisions

- **`size`** uses the standard `ImageModelV3CallOptions.size` parameter (already typed as `` `${number}x${number}` ``); `aspectRatio` emits an `'unsupported'` warning
- **`style` and `pixelDensity`** are provider-specific settings — passed by callers via `providerOptions: { pixelart: { style: 'pixel', pixelDensity: 8 } }` and validated by a Zod schema inside the image model
- **`PixelArtImageSettings`** is exported as a plain TypeScript interface from `pixelart-image-settings.ts`; the Zod-inferred type `PixelArtImageModelOptions` is exported from the image model
- `maxImagesPerCall = 1` (one image per API call)
- Uses standard `provider-utils` helpers: `postJsonToApi`, `loadApiKey`, `withUserAgentSuffix`, `parseProviderOptions`, `combineHeaders`

No existing files are modified.
